name: claw-boutique
description: AI-powered WhatsApp e-commerce bot built on AWS. Customers text a WhatsApp number to browse products, place orders, and get support. A Bedrock Agent (Nova Lite) handles conversations in real time. OpenClaw runs on EKS as the intelligence layer: it processes admin email replies, compacts interaction history, builds customer memory, and generates daily AI insights using Claude on Bedrock.
